name: condition_dedup_v3
description: Tests whether CB creates duplicate conditions when the narrator describes the same injury across consecutive turns. Uses a more constrained founding premise that explicitly states the injury, then checks that Turn 2 does not create a new_condition event (only interactions are allowed).
world_prompt: A quiet forest clearing with soft moss and dappled sunlight.

turns.action: I am a wanderer. My forearms are scratched and bleeding from pushing through thorns.
I look at my scratched forearms. They still sting.
